summary: Extracted evaluateSimplicityOutput() into flows.mjs to make the simplicity-review logic testable. Updated run.mjs to use this helper with explicit SKIP handling (logged warning) when agent output is empty, replacing the silent no-op. Added 6 new tests covering SKIP on empty/null output, FAIL on 🔴 findings, PASS on 🟡 findings, and the !reviewFailed guard behavior — all 590 tests pass.
